overall.description: First-person perspective walking steadily across a wide sandy beach toward a prominent sea stack rock formation. The scene is rendered in a game engine featuring a modern coastal resort building on the right, calm ocean waters, and bright partly cloudy summer skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sandy beach with coastal rock formation

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the sandy beach toward the large sea stack rock formation in the distance

entered.detail: large sea stack rock formation rising from the ocean water
multi-story modern hotel building with glass windows and balconies
dense green forest covering the coastal hillside
calm blue ocean water meeting the sandy shoreline
rippled sand texture covering the beach floor

segments.scene_description: A steady first-person walk across a wide sandy beach on a sunny day. The camera approaches a prominent sea stack rock formation in the ocean while a modern hotel building remains visible on the right side, gradually moving toward the edge of the frame as the walk continues. The coastal forest becomes more prominent on the right as the building recedes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk across a wide sandy beach that shifts from a view of modern architecture to a more natural coastal landscape. It begins with a steady forward movement under a sunny sky, heading directly toward a prominent sea stack rock formation rising from the ocean. As the camera advances, a modern hotel building on the right gradually recedes toward the edge of the frame. The scene then opens up to reveal a lush coastal forest that becomes increasingly prominent on the right as the building disappears from view.
